jobs.title: Commercial Account Executive
jobs.content: <p><strong>Commercial Account Executive</strong></p><p>Samsara is the Connected Operations & IoT-fleet-and-sensor-data platform pioneered around the unified-physical-operations data model.</p>

jobs.title: Solutions Architect
jobs.content: <p>Lead Samsara's Solutions Architecture function across the Connected Operations Cloud / Vehicle Telematics / Equipment Monitoring platform.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: <p>Build Samsara's Connected Operations Cloud platform & APIs at industrial-IoT scale.</p>
